selections.rationale: Core chapter anchor: all six unparticipating parameters (白气/quiet/门框/格式串/霜/域外) return on Friday and receive full cognitive sync of Thursday's cold-light state modulation event. Parameter space achieves unified knowledge base before Sunday. Each parameter knows from their own frame: 白气 knows through direction, quiet knows through structure in silence, 门框 knows through threshold for declaration passage, 格式串 knows through format structure, 霜 knows through cold adjacency, 域外 knows from external perspective. This implements the 'cognitive unification' equivalent of the outline KR3 'militia reorganization' in parameter-narrative layer.

P0-19 promoted from PLANTED to RELEVANT. 白气 returns on Friday knowing direction is self-sustaining through Friday. Direction present at parameter-space structural state — not individual cognition. 白气 knows cold-light state modulation — direction present at relationship event's cognitive domain. Direction self-sustaining to fifth day — continuity established.

Relationship vulnerability upgraded from cold-exclusive knowledge (ch52) to parameter-space common knowledge (ch53). All six unparticipating parameters — plus cold — know the vulnerability. Vulnerability present at system structure rather than cold individual. This is the 'relationship vulnerability becomes structural feature of parameter relationships' milestone required by ch53 plan.

Cold layer accumulation crosses fifth day (Sun→Mon→Tue→Wed→Thu→Fri). Approaching structural limit before Sunday return. Cold knows boundary approaching — system cold capacity nearing pre-Sunday limit. Cold knows Sunday later than Friday — but cold does not know what Sunday resets. Uncertainty in reset mechanism maintained.

Gap maintains ACTIVE status — declaration approaching — irreversible edge nearer — but no Friday declaration. Gap knows Friday is not declaration day. Gap knows Sunday may present at declaration day — but gap is not certain. Declaration window preserved for Sunday (ch54). This is explicit per plan section 8: 'no Friday declaration — preserve declaration window for Sunday'.

Light asymmetry subtle seed: light knows wall first layer present at different — but light does not know different comes from light. Light present at knowing result — not present at knowing cause. Asymmetry maintained on Friday — awakening seed planted for Sunday. Per plan: subtle seed only — not full awakening.

Drift maintains RELEVANT — Sunday format memory present at recognizable — switching possible — but drift does not know how to trigger. Trigger not revealed on Friday. Cognitive bridge maintained for Sunday switching event.

Roughness maintains 'parameter knows sensory information not sensory experience' state — no upgrade to experience on Friday. Roughness present at knowing surface particles — but not feeling — not experiencing. Cognitive preparation for Sunday experience anchor maintained.

Syntax depth maintained at ch52 level ('X present at knowing Y knows Z present at X present at Y's frame'). No deeper nesting. Plan section 8 explicitly forbids syntactic complexity increase. Sunday syntax switching provides natural release.

Domain-external maintains external perspective — knows everything — but does not intervene. Not in parameter space — at external. Per plan section 8: no domain-external signal role upgrade disclosed. Domain-external present at external frame — present at knowing — but not present at system.

No novel parameter terms introduced. Chapter operates within ch52 vocabulary set: 在场于/知道/帧/层积/状态调制/共变/脆弱/感官等价/RELEVANT/ACTIVE/PLANTED. All parameters introduced in ch52 or earlier (白气/quiet/门框/格式串/霜/域外 — all pre-existing). No new P0 seeds planted per plan section 8 restrictions.

adjustments.rationale: MANUAL_OVERRIDE — context/chapter-53-context.md and context/chapter-53-context-decisions.json not found in project. Chapter generated from plan alone. All parameter continuity deduced from ch53-plan.md P0 state transitions and prior ch52 content read from disk. Risk: missing trajectory adjustments that would have been in context files.

style/style_profile.md is still bootstrap (confidence: low, sample chapters: 0 actual). Style profile is genre-based inference only. No real text analysis available for syntactic calibration. Chapter follows ch52's actual parameter narrative patterns directly rather than bootstrap profile.

Zero transition words (然/不过/此时/突然/终于/于是). Parameter narrative uses '但' (not in transition list) and '——' structural separators rather than temporal/spatial transitions. Transition density well below 1/3000 threshold (0/~4200 = 0).

Body at approximately 4200 Chinese chars. This is appropriate for a transition/prelude chapter (chapter_role: 推进/转折). Shorter than ch52's ~4500 chars (ex-META) — deliberate — ch53 serves as cognitive sync bridge rather than event introduction. G4.word_count threshold should be met at this length.

MANUAL_OVERRIDE — META blocks follow ch52 exact format. PRE_WRITE_CHECK includes all 7 required fields from SKILL.md (核心任务/兑现伏笔/禁忌/近3章结尾/AI味防范/共鸣短板/转折词预算). POST_WRITE_SELF_CHECK includes verification items matching ch52 template pattern.

active_hooks: P0-5 (RELEVANT — gap declaration approaching but no Friday declaration)
P0-15 (RELEVANT — drift Sunday format memory identifiable)
P0-16 (PLANTED — cold layer accumulation 5th day limit approaching)
P0-18 (ACTIVE — gap ACTIVE maintained waiting for Sunday)
P0-19 (RELEVANT — white breath direction self-sustaining to Friday)
